headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Kimco Realty, Raises Price Target to $26
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $25 to $26.
